audience_summary: Small B2B teams (5–30 people) coordinating work without heavyweight project-management sprawl.
stack_note: Vue 3 SPA with PrimeVue and OpenProps; FastAPI backend in backend/ (port 8090); Vite proxies /api → 127.0.0.1:8090.

personas.name: Jordan
personas.design_implication: Calm dashboard density, clear roster status

personas.name: Riley
personas.design_implication: Focused app chrome; minimal marketing inside app

pages.purpose: Public marketing page: product name, hero headline, 3 feature bullets, primary CTA linking to /login
Email + password fields, Sign in button
Main app: welcome heading, table or list of users from GET /api/users

competitive_edge: Simple team roster view without project-management sprawl
anti_audience: Enterprise IT teams requiring SSO-only procurement and deep compliance workflows — not our first release.
voice_tone: Plain, confident, no buzzwords. Verb-first buttons (Start free trial, Sign in). Errors helpful, not cute.
brand_personality: Confident, calm B2B SaaS — approachable for small teams
design_references: Stripe Dashboard — calm data UI for Jordan
Vercel marketing — hero rhythm for Sam
anti_references: 3-tile KPI dashboard when roster table is the job
